torch_pattern: x = input.permute(0, 3, 1, 2); x = torch.nn.functional.interpolate(x, scale_factor=scale_factor, mode=mode); out = x.permute(0, 2, 3, 1)
weight_transform: none (parameter-free op); layout transform only: caller must ensure input is NHWC ROW_MAJOR (golden permutes NCHW<->NHWC around F.interpolate)
applicability_notes: Maps 1:1 to F.interpolate in NCHW with NHWC permute wrappers. Commonly fused in chains: reshape -> upsample -> reshape (5D temporal upsampling done as two upsample calls with scale (s,s) then (s,1)), and to_layout(ROW_MAJOR) -> upsample -> to_layout(TILE) -> conv2d.; torch_pattern_source: registered golden (golden_upsample)

placement_observations.source: call_site: 'x = ttnn.to_layout(x, ttnn.ROW_MAJOR_LAYOUT)  # Upsample requires row major.' — input layout must be ROW_MAJOR

memory_config.shard_spec_template: {IN_SHARDED_MEM_CONFIG} (precomputed sharded spec; input reshard forced if mismatch)

placement_observations.source: call_site: 'if input.memory_config() != self.in_sharded_mem_config: input = ttnn.to_memory_config(...)' before upsample

memory_config.shard_spec_template: {OUT_SHARDED_MEM_CONFIG} (explicit output sharded memory_config passed to op)

placement_observations.source: call_site: 'if hidden_state_l1.memory_config() != ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG' — output spilled to DRAM when feeding DRAM-slice conv path; otherwise stays L1

placement_observations.size_descriptor: bilinear-upsampled encoder hidden state ([B, 128, 128, C] target)
placement_observations.source: call_site: bilinear upsample to 128x128 followed by ttnn.to_memory_config(..., ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, dtype=ttnn.bfloat16) for concat

call_site: 'ttnn.upsample(input_tensor=x0, scale_factor=scale_factor, memory_config=None)' — default interleaved output when no memory_config given; test converts to L1 afterwards via to_memory_config
